'''Shador''' was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the [[Gamor Run/Legends|Gamor Run]]. It was the [[Shadorian]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] and had such a foul [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmosphere]], that it was painful for [[Human/Legends|Humans]] to breathe. The planet was dominated by swamps, and the various towns were built on pylons rising above the wet terrain.

Its residents were known as [[Shadorian]]s, and were known as [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]]. [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] visited the planet at least twice, the second time with a comatose [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in his hold shortly after the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].
